items.title: 2026 Kentucky Derby predictions, horses, odds, post time: Surprising picks from proven horse racing expert
items.summary: When is the 2026 Kentucky Derby? The annual Run for the Roses takes place Saturday, May 2, at Churchill Downs at 6:57 p.m. ET

items.title: Osula project pays off to help ease pressure on Howe
